'''babolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ujima|ujima]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ujima|ujima]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| babolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæbeleth|bæbeleth]] || [[word:bæbelej|bæbelej]] || [[word:bæbelesh|bæbelesh]] || [[word:bæbele|bæbele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:baboboloth|baboboloth]] || [[word:baboboloj|baboboloj]] || [[word:babobolosh|babobolosh]] || [[word:babobolo|babobolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:baboloth|baboloth]] || [[word:baboloj|baboloj]] || [[word:babolosh|babolosh]] || [[word:babolo|babolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:babofloth|babofloth]] || [[word:babofloj|babofloj]] || [[word:baboflosh|baboflosh]] || [[word:baboflof|baboflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:babolotho|babolotho]] || [[word:babolojo|babolojo]] || [[word:babolosho|babolosho]] || [[word:baboloko|baboloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:baboloth|baboloth]] || [[word:baboloj|baboloj]] || [[word:babolosh|babolosh]] || [[word:babolo|babolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:babolothol|babolothol]] || [[word:babolojol|babolojol]] || [[word:baboloshol|baboloshol]] || [[word:babolokol|babolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:babolothotho|babolothotho]] || [[word:babolojojo|babolojojo]] || [[word:baboloshosho|baboloshosho]] || [[word:baboloko|baboloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:babolothon|babolothon]] || [[word:babolojon|babolojon]] || [[word:baboloshon|baboloshon]] || [[word:babolokon|babolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:babolothoro|babolothoro]] || [[word:babolojoro|babolojoro]] || [[word:baboloshoro|baboloshoro]] || [[word:babolokoro|babolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
